title: codereview-p8i6-1: Kconfig still references ULA as primary
description: Kconfig help text and LICHEN_IPV6 still describe ULA instead of Yggdrasil 02xx primary address. Needs update per bead spec. tagged codereview
close_reason: Kconfig updated for Yggdrasil 02xx primary; routing classify, SCHC rule selection, and related comments cleaned. Native sim routing tests pass.
